design_philosophy: Institutional, trusted, data-driven, educational, high-contrast, clear information hierarchy. Avoids retail forex aesthetics, trading/gambling visuals, and neon colors. Emphasizes authority and transparency.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter text-[#0A2540] leading-tight
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A] leading-tight

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm
header.rules: Ensure navigation links have clear active states and a prominent institutional CTA.

cards.default: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 rounded-lg
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:border-[#0A2540] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer rounded-lg

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A2540] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] hover:text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A2540] text-[#0A2540] hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#475569] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] hover:text-[#0F172A] px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-white border border-[#CBD5E1] focus:border-[#0A2540] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0A2540] rounded-md px-4 py-2 w-full text-[#0F172A]

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, consistent sizing (20px or 24px) for data points and navigation.

motion_and_interaction.hover_effects: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-1) for interactive cards. Strict color shifts for text links.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Ensure focus rings are visible. Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Implement the UI using a stark white and slate grey palette to establish an institutional, trustworthy tone.
For the 'Intelligent Investor Onboarding', use a multi-step form with clear progress indicators and interactive, data-driven question layouts.
The 'Portfolio Intelligence Dashboard' must be dense but legible, utilizing the bento grid system with explicit borders and 1px strokes rather than heavy shadows.
Implement the 'Without FX vs With FOX I FX Strategy' comparison charts using Recharts, using the institutional color palette (Navy vs Teal) to show clear performance deltas.
The 'Historical Stress Testing' section should feature interactive sliders and timeline charts, emphasizing resilience and risk management.
The 'AI-Powered Portfolio Narrator' should be designed as a sophisticated side-panel or inline text stream, using a clean monospace font (IBM Plex Mono) for its 'thinking' state to feel analytical.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and key interactive elements have descriptive 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="start-onboarding-btn"').
Avoid any retail trading aesthetics like neon green/red candles, large glowing buttons, or 'gamified' elements.
